creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
The port cannot be installed:

# pwd
/usr/ports/games/iourbanterror
# make install
===>  iourbanterror-4.1.1.s2318,1 needs at least one of CLIENT, DEDICATED and SMP options.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/games/iourbanterror.

# make config

(No options to select CLIENT DEDICATED or SMP)

Fix: 

Add the correct options
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/games/iourbanterror
# make install
